sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n68573" key="monolh/mmatos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μονο-λήμμᾰτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n68573.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with but one premiss</tr_>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λόγοι</foreign> Chrysipp. and <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1146.tlg001:2:84" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antip.Stoic.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.84</biblScope> </bibl>; <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">συλλογισμοί</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0732.tlg006:8:17" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Alex.Aphr.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Top.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">8.17</biblScope></bibl></cit>,al.</sense> </entryFree>
